description: The Playwright suite is missing automated coverage for this user journey: Automate the "home page loads with catalog heading" user journey end to end using Playwright. Focus on routes "/" and verify visible user outcomes.. Add or extend a test that performs the same user actions and asserts visible outcomes.
expectedOutcome: After adding Playwright coverage for "Automate the "home page loads with catalog heading" user journey end to end using Playwright. Focus on routes "/" and verify visible user outcomes.", the test should pass by asserting the expected user-visible behaviour for that journey.
hint: Inspect app.spec.js (e2e/app.spec.js) and extend an existing describe/test block with steps and expects that cover this journey end to end.
solution: This is an automation coverage gap. The fix is to add Playwright steps that mirror the described journey, then assert visible outcomes so npm run test:e2e fails before coverage is added and pass once it is complete.
playwrightTests: Playwright tests fail or are incomplete until the candidate adds the missing automation for the flow; they pass after the new test asserts the same user-visible behaviour as on the default branch.
playwrightTestSnippets: e2e/app.spec.js — add or extend this spec so the flow is covered; use fail-then-pass checks against the running app.
